headline: As Amazon And Others Turn To AI Hiring Tools, PepsiCo Doubles Down On 'Hustle' And Curiosity
summary: PepsiCo Inc chief people officer Becky Schmitt said the company is doubling down on "hustle," curiosity and adaptability as artificial intelligence reshapes how employers define top talent. AI Drives Talent Shift At PepsiCo Schmitt said the company's "secret sauce" for...

headline: Piper Sandler Sticks With Buy Rating on PepsiCo (PEP) Amid Inflation Concerns
summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) ranks among the best retirement stocks to buy now. On May 20, Piper Sandler analyst Michael Lavery reaffirmed a Buy rating on PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) with a price target of $181. Previously, on April 20, Piper Sandler held an Overweight rating on the company’s shares, stating that inflationary concerns are increasing but […]
